title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-model workflow combining Claude Opus for planning and backend work with Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design in frontend development. He argues Gemini produces superior visual designs while Opus excels at planning, copy writing, and integrations.
